text: In the first image, I feel a peculiar stillness—a sterile, modern corridor defined by glass and minimalism. The world appears orderly but slightly impersonal, as though inviting contemplation yet keeping emotion at bay. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and the bold presence of 'R+D,' I’m energized. The words and displays spark my curiosity, creating a feeling of intellectual play, as if I’m participating in a conversation about innovation and discovery. There’s an air of possibility here—both inviting and slightly overwhelming.
